Cake Smash Time! What to Expect- Guest Blogger

🎂Year-in-Review Cake Smash🎂 Our most popular one year session for the last two years uses images from a child’s first year to create a backdrop for their cake smash! All of our one year/cake smash sessions include family portraits, individual images, the cake smash, and then a mini tub portion. For these particular sessions: 1️⃣ Clients send us about 100 images from their child’s first year. 2️⃣ We edit them into black and white and have them printed from our lab. 3️⃣ We attach them to the backdrop one at a time to create the sweetest glimpse into baby’s first year as a whole! Clients are often emotional when they walk in and see the culmination of so many sleepless nights and hard days and wonderful days and holidays and fun and exhaustion. AND they get to take them all home when we are finished. Photographers, have you tried these sessions yet? Clients, do you have a little one with a birthday this year?? Let’s get planning!!
